title: Rewrite intent router to AI-first architecture with legacy fallback
goal: 라우터를 AI-first로 전환한다. API 키가 있으면 항상 ai_agent.plan()을 먼저 호출하여 멀티스텝 계획을 받는다. API 키가 없으면 기존 규칙 기반 라우팅(_route_legacy)으로 폴백한다. AI 프롬프트를 언어 무관으로 수정한다.

test_requirements.case: AI-first: command with API key calls ai_agent.plan()
test_requirements.expected: task has steps from AI plan, used_ai=True

test_requirements.case: AI-first: multi-step plan returned by AI
test_requirements.expected: fake AI returns 3 steps, all 3 appear in task.steps

test_requirements.case: Legacy: command without API key uses rule matching
test_requirements.expected: simple URL command routes to crawler, used_ai=False

test_requirements.case: Legacy: all existing router tests still pass
Custom command still short-circuits before AI
test_requirements.expected: custom command matched before AI plan called

test_requirements.case: AI plan with param_template steps preserved
test_requirements.expected: step.param_template=True passed through from AI response

test_requirements.case: AI plan with condition steps preserved
test_requirements.expected: step.condition field passed through from AI response
prompt says 'same language as user command' not 'Korean'

constraints: Extract current non-AI routing into _route_legacy() — do NOT delete it, call it when has_api_key()=False
Keep normalize_command() call before AI plan — URL particle stripping helps AI too
Keep _hydrate_step_params() and _annotate_risk() — called on AI plan results too
Keep custom command check at top of route() — unchanged
In agent.py: change SYSTEM_PROMPT to say 'You are the PRIMARY planner' and 'Respond in same language as user'
In agent.py: increase max_tokens from 1024 to 2048 in plan()
In summarizer.py: change 'in Korean' to 'in the same language as the user command'
In task.py: add ai_usage field (dict, default empty), fix duplicate used_ai if present
Do NOT modify tools/, plugins/, orchestrator/engine.py, normalizer.py, korean.py, rules/
All existing tests that set has_api_key=False must continue to pass unchanged
New test file must mock ai_agent.plan() and has_api_key() — no real AI calls
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
